era: 1983-present. Sludge Metal. E=9 -- Metal Summit maximum. Aberdeen/Montesano. Atlantic Records (Houdini era context).
recalibration_note: E=8 at degree 308 (general sludge portrait); E=9 at degree 334 (Metal Summit maximum, SPS pairing determining factor). The extra energy unit reflects the context escalation and the exact frequency alignment between Melvins sludge (40-100 Hz sub-bass) and whale-volcano infrasonic (0.5-200 Hz).

theory_nodes.concept: E=18: The heaviest degree in the engine. Melvins E=9 (S36-334) + Whale+Volcano E=9 (SPS-334) = E=18. No other degree reaches this total. The maximum pairing.
theory_nodes.description: The engine's maximum energy degree. Human, biological, geological all at maximum simultaneously.

theory_nodes.concept: Frequency alignment: Melvins sludge 40-100 Hz (sub-bass adjacency to infrasonic) matches whale vocalization 20-200 Hz and volcanic seismic 0.5-10 Hz. Not metaphorical -- actual frequency range overlap. The three converge at the bottom of audible spectrum.
theory_nodes.description: Human sludge metal, whale song, and volcanic signal share frequency range.

theory_nodes.concept: Metal Summit E=9 position 2 of 4. The Summit arc: E=8 (Snakes, 333), E=9 (Melvins, 334), E=9 (Soundgarden, 335), E=9 (AIC, 336). Melvins as the sludge primogeniture entry, the original that made the Summit possible.
theory_nodes.description: Position 2 of the Metal Summit. Sludge primogeniture.

cross_references.relationship: PRIOR APPEARANCE. E=8 general portrait: Aberdeen origin, Buzz Osborne, Dale Crover, Cobain connection, 40-year discography. E=9 here: Metal Summit context, SPS pairing frequency alignment, maximum energy degree.
Metal Summit position 1 (E=8) to position 2 (E=9). Post-metal architecture opens; sludge primogeniture escalates.
Metal Summit continues. Both E=9. Sludge (Aberdeen, Melvins) to heavy metal (U-District, Soundgarden). Contemporaneous on major labels 1992-1994.

E=9 + E=9 = E=18. THE HEAVIEST DEGREE. Sludge metal sub-bass meets infrasonic deep Pacific dual. Frequency ranges overlap: Melvins 40-100 Hz, whale 20-200 Hz, volcano 0.5-10 Hz. Human, biological, geological at maximum simultaneously.

milestones: E=18 -- HEAVIEST DEGREE IN THE ENGINE
